lint.command: echo "No lint configured for new packages yet"

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add exception in gateway-worker skill for contract-only/scaffolding features: when a feature is purely type definitions and export tests, allow test-first and implementation in a single pass rather than requiring strict RED-GREEN-REFACTOR with separate test-first commits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature mobile-contracts-package was implemented and tested together (single pass) rather than following strict test-first RED workflow mandated by gateway-worker skill. The reviewer noted this is a natural pattern for contract scaffolding where types and their export tests are defined simultaneously.
